name: token-optimizer
description: Reduce OpenClaw AI costs by 97%. Haiku model routing, free Ollama heartbeats, prompt caching, and budget controls. Go from $1,500/month to $50/month in 5 minutes.

changes: 从 OpenClaw 技能市场导入

quickstart.overview: 大幅降低OpenClaw API token成本
scenarios: 将默认模型路由到成本更低的Haiku
配置心跳服务到免费本地大模型
利用缓存重用提示以降低90%花费
quickstart.example: 帮我安装token-optimizer并分析我当前的配置，我想把API开销降下来。
quickstart.notes: 默认仅预览，加--apply才生效，配置自动备份在~/.openclaw/backups/
